title: gladiolus sekukuniensis
intro: Gladiolus sekukuniensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the gladiolus or sword lily. This plant has been traditionally used in South African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Gladiolus sekukuniensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its use as a treatment for snake bites. Gladiolus sekukuniensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and has also been used in traditional remedies in the form of poultices or ointments.
